name: Sanity
description: Monitor Sanity headless CMS projects for team access and content infrastructure compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Sanity at https://manage.sanity.io
2. Go to API → Tokens
3. Create a token with Viewer or higher permissions
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Sanity manage.sanity.io → API → Tokens

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Sanity projects for content infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Sanity project members and their content management access
